roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, payment callbacks, report outbox, safe update controller and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

features: replaces the customer raw order/link dump with a compact order list and a separate order detail view
adds an active-service center to the reseller Telegram management bot with view, refresh and two-step deletion
adds an active-service page to the reseller web dashboard with search, link copy and confirmed deletion
deletes the remote PasarGuard user through DELETE /api/user/{username} while treating HTTP 404 as already removed
keeps financial and order history, marks the service deleted locally and removes it from all customer service views
cleans auto-renewal, health, failover, guarantee and imported-service claim records with fail-open compatibility
shows a clear permission error when the connected PasarGuard admin lacks users.delete permission
keeps every new Telegram callback_data below the 64-byte Bot API limit
does not add or alter D1 schema and excludes README files

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; no manual D1 action is required
deployment.pasarguard_delete_permission: the connected panel administrator must have users.delete permission

validation.service_deleted_filter: passed by static and SQLite assertions

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
remote service deletion requires the connected PasarGuard administrator to have users.delete permission
deleting a service is irreversible on the remote panel; BluePanel intentionally preserves its payment history
